name: Cosmouth Temporal Identity
work_cycles: Shipyard, tide, and archive rhythms shape daily time
feast_days: Maritime celebrations and archive-linked civic observances punctuate the year
legal_deadlines: Cargo, customs, and treasury clocks matter intensely around departures and landfalls
shipping_windows: Tides, storm seasons, and safer sea periods rule scheduling
weather_expectations: Ocean-planet and hurricane conditions matter more here than inland week texture
mourning_and_renewal_customs: Loss at sea and vessel dedication practices shape remembrance
public_language_about_time: People often mark time by tide, departure, storm season, and convoy timing
